meta.source: Louw-Nida Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament based on Semantic Domains (2nd ed.)
meta.description: Semantic domain labels for StudyPanel display. Keys in 'subdomains' are in canonical form: major domain number (no leading zeros) + 3-digit sub-code. Suitable for reuse in domain browser, search filters, and related-word displays.
